headsUp: Ciro Salvo is a legend in Naples. Do not go to Naples without eating here.
teaser: My favorite of the dozen traditional Neapolitan spots I tried in Naples.
review: Most of the traditional Neapolitan pizza in Naples is going to taste roughly the same (and be very good), but this was my favorite of the dozen traditional spots I tried.
